parsed_output.justification: James exhibits highly suspicious behavior by attempting to speak first and then abruptly stating he will remain silent for the rest of the game without providing any role claim. In contrast, Mitchell and Mike provide coordinated claims (Seer and Robber) that support each other, and Justin identifies as a Villager. Given James's refusal to participate in the discussion and the lack of a claim, he is the most likely candidate to be a Werewolf.
